methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Chips & Semiconductors (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 14 same-sector peers exist in Chips & Semiconductors, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Semiconductors P/S median is 20.6x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

data.narrative:
Ranovus is a Series D+ stage semiconductor company that has raised $236M in total funding, including a $36M Strategic Innovation Fund grant in August 2025. The target operates within a competitive landscape of 11 identified peers: 3 public comparables (ALAB, NVDA, AMD) and 8 private-stage companies including Cerebras, PsiQuantum, Etched, SambaNova Systems, and Credo Semiconductor.

Traditional triangulation methods yield limited applicability here. Peer-median analysis cannot proceed due to insufficient same-stage or adjacent-stage comparables within the Chips & Semiconductors sector—while 14 same-sector peers exist in the dataset, fewer than three qualify under stage or valuation-tier filters. Public-comp anchoring is similarly constrained: the three public semiconductors trade at a median P/S multiple of 20.6x, but Ranovus's revenue remains undisclosed, precluding revenue-multiple application. This revenue opacity is characteristic of private-stage semiconductor firms.

The analysis cannot produce a definitive valuation range without either (1) disclosed revenue figures for the target or peer set, or (2) a sufficient cluster of same-stage private comparables with disclosed valuations. Key uncertainties include the company's current run-rate revenue, capital efficiency relative to peers, and the applicability of mature-semiconductor multiples to an early-revenue or pre-revenue frontier-tech business. Additional datapoints on recent funding round terms and peer valuations would be required to establish credible triangulation.
